text.title: mistake-memory Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for mistake-memory as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Prevention step is "be more careful" or "review before committing".
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: These are not actionable. A concrete prevention step specifies a trigger and an action: "When task keywords include 'migration', run COUNT(*) on affected tables before planning."

failure-mode.description: Root cause attributed to "insufficient context" without identifying the specific missing piece.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Every LLM failure can be attributed to "insufficient context" — this is always true and always useless. Identify what specific documentation, example, or constraint was absent.

failure-mode.description: Entry title does not include domain keywords: "MIS-007: Bug in code".
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Keyword search is the primary retrieval mechanism. Domain keywords in the title ("MIS-007: Database Migration — Missing Row Count Check") enable reliable pre-task matching.
